# `polars selector exclude` for [expression](/commands/categories/expression.md)

<div class='command-title'>Select all columns except those with the given name(s). This is the inverse of `polars selector by-name`.</div>

## Signature

```> polars selector exclude {flags} ...rest```

## Parameters

 -  `...rest`: Column name(s) to exclude from the selection.


## Input/output types:

| input | output          |
| ----- | --------------- |
| any   | polars_selector |
## Examples

Select all columns except 'a' and 'b'
```nu
> {
    "a": [1.0, 2.0],
    "b": [3.0, 4.0],
    "c": [5, 6],
} |
polars into-df --as-columns |
polars select (polars selector exclude a b) |
polars collect
╭───┬───╮
│ # │ c │
├───┼───┤
│ 0 │ 5 │
│ 1 │ 6 │
╰───┴───╯

```

Select all columns except 'c'
```nu
> [[a b c]; [1 2 3] [4 5 6]]
    | polars into-df
    | polars select (polars selector exclude c)
    | polars collect

```
